title: WebAIM: The WebAIM Million - The 2026 report on the accessibility of the top 1,000,000 home pages
excerpt: For the eighth consecutive year, WebAIM conducted an accessibility evaluation of the home pages for the top 1,000,000 web sites. The evaluation was conducted using the WAVE stand-alone API (with additional tools to collect site technology and category data). The results provide an overview of and insight into the current state of web accessibility for individuals with disabilities as well as trends over time.
content_html:
Introduction

For the eighth consecutive year, WebAIM conducted an accessibility evaluation of the home pages for the top 1,000,000 web sites. The evaluation was conducted using the WAVE stand-alone API (with additional tools to collect site technology and category data). The results provide an overview of and insight into the current state of web accessibility for individuals with disabilities as well as trends over time.

Note!

Results below are from February 2026—with comparisons to, and trends from, earlier analyses in 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, and 2025.

WebAIM can assist you in your accessibility journey by providing training, testing, and consulting and technical assistance.

The Sample

Site Lookup

How did your home page rank in our study? Enter a web site domain below to view details.

The million home page list was derived from the Tranco ranking which combines several sources of "top" web sites.

Sites without home pages, pages that returned errors (404, etc.), pages with fewer than 10 HTML elements, and pages with more than 5,000 links to the same domain (for SEO purposes) were not included.

Methodology

The WAVE accessibility engine was used to analyze the rendered DOM (Document Object Model) of all pages after scripting and styles were applied. WAVE detects end-user accessibility barriers and Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 A/AA conformance failures. All automated tools, including WAVE, have limitations—not all conformance failures can be automatically detected. Absence of detected errors does not indicate that a page is accessible or conformant. Although this report describes only a subset of accessibility issues on only 1,000,000 home pages, this report provides a quantified and reliable representation of the current state of the accessibility of the most influential pages on the web.

Detected Errors

Across the one million home pages, 56,114,377 distinct accessibility errors were detected—an average of 56.1 errors per page. The number of detected errors increased 10.1% since the 2025 analysis which found 51 errors/page. "Errors" are WAVE-detected accessibility barriers having notable end user impact, and which have a very high likelihood of being WCAG 2.2 Level A/AA conformance failures.

This chart shows the average number of detectable errors per home page over time:

Home Page Complexity

The home pages tested had over 1.4 billion page elements. Home page complexity continues to steadily increase. The average number of page elements increased to 1437 per home page in February 2026—a 22.5% increase in only one year!

The following chart shows the number of home page elements detected over time:

The number of home page elements has nearly doubled in the last 7 years. 3.9% of all home page elements had a detected accessibility error. Users with disabilities would expect to encounter errors on 1 in every 26 home page elements.

Note!

Error density (number of errors divided by number of page elements) is provided in the site lookup, but is alone an unreliable metric of site accessibility. A significant number of page elements (<div> and <span> elements, for example) may result in a lower error density (suggesting better accessibility), when in fact many new accessibility errors may have also been introduced. This report focuses primarily on the average number of detected errors (likely end user barriers) present rather than error density (how diluted those errors are within page elements).

There was a correlation between page popularity and home page complexity. The most popular 100,000 pages averaged 1,584 elements—20% more page elements than the least popular 100,000 sites in the million page sample (1,318 elements).

WCAG Conformance

95.9% of home pages had detected WCAG 2 failures. This number increased from 94.8% in 2025—reversing a trend of small improvements each of the previous 6 years. Because only automatically detectable WCAG failures were considered, this suggests that the rate of full WCAG 2 A/AA conformance was certainly lower than 4.1%.

This chart shows the percentage of home pages with detected WCAG conformance failures over time:

While the number of pages with no detectable errors was very low, 20.5% of pages had 5 or fewer detected errors and 30.4% had 10 or fewer.

Percentage of pages with most common errors
WCAG Failure Type% of home pages
Low contrast text83.9%
Missing alternative text for images53.1%
Missing form input labels51%
Empty links46.3%
Empty buttons30.6%
Missing document language13.5%

96% of all errors detected fall into these six categories. These most common errors have been the same for the last 7 years. Addressing just these few types of issues would significantly improve accessibility across the web.

Percentage of pages with most common errors over time (2019–2026)
Issue 2019 2020 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026
Low Contrast Text 85.3% 86.3% 86.4% 83.9% 83.6% 81% 79.1% 83.9%
Missing alt text 68% 66% 60.6% 55.4% 58.2% 54.5% 55.5% 53.1%
Missing labels 52.8% 53.8% 54.4% 46.1% 45.9% 48.6% 48.2% 51%
Empty Links 58.1% 59.9% 51.3% 49.7% 50.1% 44.6% 45.4% 46.3%
Empty buttons 25% 28.7% 26.9% 27.2% 27.5% 28.2% 29.6% 30.6%
Missing language 33.1% 28% 28.9% 22.3% 18.6% 17.1% 15.8% 13.5%

The number of pages with missing alternative text and missing document language decreased since 2025, whereas pages with low contrast text, missing labels, empty links, and empty buttons increased.

Low Contrast Text

Low contrast text, below the WCAG 2 AA thresholds, was found on 83.9% of home pages, an increase from 79.1% in 2025. This was the most commonly-detected accessibility issue. On average, each home page had 34 distinct instances of low-contrast text, up 15% from 2025.

Images and Alternative Text

Home pages are becoming increasingly graphical with the number of home page images nearly doubling in 8 years. There were over 66.6 million images in the sample, or 66.6 images per home page on average, a surprising 13.6% increase in only one year. 16.2% of all home page images (10.8 per page on average) had missing alternative text (not counting alt=""). While there were notably more images, the proportion of images missing alt text dropped from 18.5% in 2025. 45% of the images missing alternative text were linked images—resulting in links that were not descriptive. One out of every four linked images was missing alternative text.

10.8% of images with alternative text had questionable or repetitive alternative text—such as alt="image", "graphic", "blank", a file name, etc., or alternative text identical to adjacent text or the alternative text of an adjacent image.

These data show that more than one in four images on popular home pages have missing, questionable, or repetitive alternative text. The proportion of problematic images, however, is steadily decreasing over time.

Form Labeling

Home pages had 6.9 form inputs on average—a 36% increase in the last 3 years. One third (33.1%) of those form inputs were not properly labeled (either via <label>, aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title).

Headings

Nearly 30 million headings were detected (29.9 on average per home page). Headings were increasingly prevalent on home pages—the total number of headings increased 20.4% in just one year. The number (and prevalence) of heading levels were:

  • 1.5 million <h1> headings (5.1%)
  • 8.7 million <h2> headings (29%)
  • 11.2 million <h3> headings (37.5%)
  • 4.4 million <h4> headings (14.7%)
  • 2 million <h5> headings (6.8%)
  • 2.1 million <h6> headings (6.9%)

The number of <h1>s per page has decreased slightly over time. The number of <h4>s and <h5>s increased slightly over time. And the number of <h2>s, <h3>s, and <h6>s increased significantly over time.

The number of <h6>s more than doubled in the last year. Interestingly, 94.9% of home pages that have at least one <h6> also have skipped heading levels. This suggests that most of these headings probably do not reflect the actual document structure.

Because headings are the primary mechanism used by screen reader users to navigate content, their proper implementation is important. 18.1% of home pages had more than one <h1>—an increase from 16.3% in 2025. There were 1,206,444 instances of skipped heading levels (e.g., jumping from <h2> to <h4>)—one in every 25 headings. Skipped heading levels were present on 41.8% of all pages, up from 39% in 2025. 7.5% of pages had no headings, down from 9.8% in 2025.

Regions

Regions/landmarks were increasingly present. 84.3% of home pages had at least one region (or ARIA landmark) defined—an increase from 80.5% in 2025. A <main> element or main landmark was present on 46.1% of home pages, up from 42.6% in 2025. 18.8% of home pages had a "search" landmark, up from 16.6% in 2025.

ARIA

133,589,803 ARIA attributes were detected—over 133 per page on average! ARIA code increased 27% in just one year and is over 6 times higher than it was in 2019.

This chart shows the number of ARIA attributes per home page over time:

The prevalence of ARIA labels and descriptions increased 28% in just the last year. Home pages averaged 31.4 aria-label, aria-labelledby, or aria-describedby attributes.

82.7% of the one million home pages used ARIA (excluding ARIA landmark roles), up from 79.4% in 2025. Home pages with ARIA present had significantly more errors (59.1 on average) than pages without ARIA (42 on average). While ARIA is intended to improve accessibility, one would expect to encounter an additional 17 potential barriers on home pages with ARIA present.

Increased ARIA usage on pages was associated with higher detected errors. The more ARIA attributes that were present, the more detected accessibility errors could be expected. This does not necessarily mean that ARIA introduced these errors (these pages were also more complex), but pages typically had significantly more errors when more ARIA was present.

5.7% of home pages had an ARIA menu (role="menu"), but 22% of those ARIA menus introduced accessibility barriers due to the lack of necessary ARIA menu markup and interactions.

Home pages averaged 23.3 aria-hidden="true" attributes (up 30% from 18 in 2025 and over 250% since 2020) and 4.8 role="button" attributes (up from 3.6 in 2025). Home pages averaged 30.4 instances of tabindex=0 or tabindex=-1 (up 17% from 26 in 2025 and up nearly 300% since 2020).

Links

15.2% of pages had ambiguous link text, such as "click here", "more", "continue", etc. (an increase from 13.7% of pages in 2025, though down from 23.2% in 2020). These pages had 5.3 instances of ambiguous links on average (down from 6.8 in 2025).

Skip Links

17.1% of home pages had a "skip" link present, up from 15.3% in 2025. One out of every ten "skip" links were broken—either they were hidden in a way that made them inaccessible or the link target was not present in the page.

Doctypes

93.2% of home pages had a valid HTML5 doctype—an increase from 92.4% in 2025, 91.6% in 2024, 89.8% in 2023, 86.1% in 2022 and 79.1% in 2021. Pages with a valid HTML5 doctype had nearly double the number of page elements (average of 1497 vs. 754). They also had more detectable errors (average of 56.4 vs. 51.7) than pages with other doctypes. 468 unique doctypes were encountered in the million-page sample.

Site Categories

Note!

Site category data was collected using Amazon Web Services Bedrock AI.

The tables below show the average number of pages and detectable errors in each category, and the percent difference in errors for that category from the average of 56.1 errors for the entire million-page sample—ordered from "best" to "worst". Pages that utilized most of these popular ad systems had more errors on average than pages that did not utilize ad networks. The data suggest that ads were among the strongest harbingers of accessibility errors.

Other technologies

Other common technologies also correlated to more errors:

  • 9.6% of pages had ReCAPTCHA, and these pages had 7.7 more errors than average.
  • 6.2% of pages were detected as having YouTube videos and these pages had 9.4 more errors than average.

Web sites that used common cookie compliance technologies, such as OneTrust (34.6 errors on average), averaged notably fewer errors than average, whereas sites that used browser fingerprinting and user tracking technologies, such as FingerprintJS (112.4 errors on average), had significantly more errors than average. This may suggest a relationship between user privacy and accessibility practices.

948,225 tables were observed on 143,575 pages (down from 972,746 tables on 142,976 pages in 2025). 181,188 (19%) of the tables had valid data table markup.

Conclusion

The 2026 WebAIM Million analysis found notable increases in both the number of detected accessibility errors and number of pages with WCAG conformance failures, reversing a trend of gradual accessibility improvements in recent years. A primary concern is the significant increase in home page complexity and ARIA code—both of which correlate to increased detectable errors.

These trends likely reflect broader shifts in web development including increased reliance on 3rd party frameworks and libraries and automated or AI-assisted coding practices (“vibe coding”). Home pages are getting larger and more technologically complex at an alarming rate, making accessibility more difficult to achieve and maintain. A key takeaway from this year's report is improving accessibility at scale will require both better practices and simpler systems. Alternatively, complex systems need to do a better job of focusing on accessibility fundamentals.

Skipped heading levels were present on 41.8% of all pages, up from 39% in 2025. 7.5% of pages had no headings, down from 9.8% in 2025. Regions Regions/landmarks were increasingly present. 84.3% of home pages had at least one region (or ARIA landmark) defined—an increase from 80.5% in 2025. A <main> element or main landmark was present on 46.1% of home pages, up from 42.6% in 2025. 18.8% of home pages had a "search" landmark, up from 16.6% in 2025. ARIA 133,589,803 ARIA attributes were detected—over 133 per page on average! ARIA code increased 27% in just one year and is over 6 times higher than it was in 2019. This chart shows the number of ARIA attributes per home page over time: The prevalence of ARIA labels and descriptions increased 28% in just the last year. Home pages averaged 31.4 aria-label, aria-labelledby, or aria-describedby attributes. 82.7% of the one million home pages used ARIA (excluding ARIA landmark roles), up from 79.4% in 2025. Home pages with ARIA present had significantly more errors (59.1 on average) than pages without ARIA (42 on average). While ARIA is intended to improve accessibility, one would expect to encounter an additional 17 potential barriers on home pages with ARIA present. Increased ARIA usage on pages was associated with higher detected errors. The more ARIA attributes that were present, the more detected accessibility errors could be expected. This does not necessarily mean that ARIA introduced these errors (these pages were also more complex), but pages typically had significantly more errors when more ARIA was present. 5.7% of home pages had an ARIA menu (role="menu"), but 22% of those ARIA menus introduced accessibility barriers due to the lack of necessary ARIA menu markup and interactions. Home pages averaged 23.3 aria-hidden="true" attributes (up 30% from 18 in 2025 and over 250% since 2020) and 4.8 role="button" attributes (up from 3.6 in 2025). Home pages averaged 30.4 instances of tabindex=0 or tabindex=-1 (up 17% from 26 in 2025 and up nearly 300% since 2020). Links 15.2% of pages had ambiguous link text, such as "click here", "more", "continue", etc. (an increase from 13.7% of pages in 2025, though down from 23.2% in 2020). These pages had 5.3 instances of ambiguous links on average (down from 6.8 in 2025). Skip Links 17.1% of home pages had a "skip" link present, up from 15.3% in 2025. One out of every ten "skip" links were broken—either they were hidden in a way that made them inaccessible or the link target was not present in the page. Doctypes 93.2% of home pages had a valid HTML5 doctype—an increase from 92.4% in 2025, 91.6% in 2024, 89.8% in 2023, 86.1% in 2022 and 79.1% in 2021. Pages with a valid HTML5 doctype had nearly double the number of page elements (average of 1497 vs. 754). They also had more detectable errors (average of 56.4 vs. 51.7) than pages with other doctypes. 468 unique doctypes were encountered in the million-page sample. Site Categories Note! Site category data was collected using Amazon Web Services Bedrock AI. The tables below show the average number of pages and detectable errors in each category, and the percent difference in errors for that category from the average of 56.1 errors for the entire million-page sample—ordered from "best" to "worst". The data suggest that ads were among the strongest harbingers of accessibility errors. Other technologies Other common technologies also correlated to more errors: 9.6% of pages had ReCAPTCHA, and these pages had 7.7 more errors than average. 6.2% of pages were detected as having YouTube videos and these pages had 9.4 more errors than average. Web sites that used common cookie compliance technologies, such as OneTrust (34.6 errors on average), averaged notably fewer errors than average, whereas sites that used browser fingerprinting and user tracking technologies, such as FingerprintJS (112.4 errors on average), had significantly more errors than average. This may suggest a relationship between user privacy and accessibility practices. 948,225 tables were observed on 143,575 pages (down from 972,746 tables on 142,976 pages in 2025). 181,188 (19%) of the tables had valid data table markup. Conclusion The 2026 WebAIM Million analysis found notable increases in both the number of detected accessibility errors and number of pages with WCAG conformance failures, reversing a trend of gradual accessibility improvements in recent years. A primary concern is the significant increase in home page complexity and ARIA code—both of which correlate to increased detectable errors. These trends likely reflect broader shifts in web development including increased reliance on 3rd party frameworks and libraries and automated or AI-assisted coding practices (“vibe coding”). Home pages are getting larger and more technologically complex at an alarming rate, making accessibility more difficult to achieve and maintain. A key takeaway from this year's report is improving accessibility at scale will require both better practices and simpler systems. Alternatively, complex systems need to do a better job of focusing on accessibility fundamentals.

blocks.html_en: For the eighth consecutive year, WebAIM conducted an accessibility evaluation of the home pages for the top 1,000,000 web sites. The evaluation was conducted using the WAVE stand-alone API (with additional tools to collect site technology and category data). The results provide an overview of and insight into the current state of web accessibility for individuals with disabilities as well as trends over time.

blocks.html_en: The WAVE accessibility engine was used to analyze the rendered DOM (Document Object Model) of all pages after scripting and styles were applied. WAVE detects end-user accessibility barriers and Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 A/AA conformance failures. All automated tools, including WAVE, have limitations—not all conformance failures can be automatically detected. Absence of detected errors does not indicate that a page is accessible or conformant. Although this report describes only a subset of accessibility issues on only 1,000,000 home pages, this report provides a quantified and reliable representation of the current state of the accessibility of the most influential pages on the web.

A significant number of page elements (<div> and <span> elements, for example) may result in a lower error density (suggesting better accessibility), when in fact many new accessibility errors may have also been introduced. This report focuses primarily on the average number of detected errors (likely end user barriers) present rather than error density (how diluted those errors are within page elements).

blocks.html_en: Low contrast text, below the WCAG 2 AA thresholds, was found on 83.9% of home pages, an increase from 79.1% in 2025. This was the most commonly-detected accessibility issue. On average, each home page had 34 distinct instances of low-contrast text, up 15% from 2025.

sentences.en: Low contrast text, below the WCAG 2 AA thresholds, was found on 83.9% of home pages, an increase from 79.1% in 2025.
sentences.zh: 83.9% 的主页上发现了低于 WCAG 2 AA 阈值的低对比度文本，这一比例较 2025 年的 79.1% 有所增加。

sentences.en: This was the most commonly-detected accessibility issue.
sentences.zh: 这是最常检测到的可访问性问题。

sentences.en: On average, each home page had 34 distinct instances of low-contrast text, up 15% from 2025.
sentences.zh: 平均而言，每个主页有 34 个不同的低对比度文本实例，比 2025 年增加了 15%。

blocks.html_en: Home pages are becoming increasingly graphical with the number of home page images nearly doubling in 8 years. There were over 66.6 million images in the sample, or 66.6 images per home page on average, a surprising 13.6% increase in only one year. 16.2% of all home page images (10.8 per page on average) had missing alternative text (not counting alt=""). While there were notably more images, the proportion of images missing alt text dropped from 18.5% in 2025. 45% of the images missing alternative text were linked images—resulting in links that were not descriptive. One out of every four linked images was missing alternative text.

sentences.en: Home pages are becoming increasingly graphical with the number of home page images nearly doubling in 8 years.
sentences.zh: 主页变得越来越图形化，主页图像的数量在 8 年内几乎翻了一番。

sentences.en: There were over 66.6 million images in the sample, or 66.6 images per home page on average, a surprising 13.6% increase in only one year.
sentences.zh: 样本中有超过 6660 万张图像，平均每个主页有 66.6 张图像，仅一年内就增加了 13.6%，令人惊讶。

sentences.en: 16.2% of all home page images (10.8 per page on average) had missing alternative text (not counting alt="").
sentences.zh: 16.2% 的主页图像（平均每页 10.8 张）缺少替代文本（不包括 alt=""）。

sentences.en: While there were notably more images, the proportion of images missing alt text dropped from 18.5% in 2025.
sentences.zh: 虽然图像明显增多，但缺少替代文本的图像比例从 2025 年的 18.5% 下降。

sentences.en: 45% of the images missing alternative text were linked images—resulting in links that were not descriptive.
sentences.zh: 缺少替代文本的图像中有 45% 是链接图像，导致链接不具有描述性。

sentences.en: One out of every four linked images was missing alternative text.
sentences.zh: 每四个链接图像中就有一个缺少替代文本。

blocks.html_en: 10.8% of images with alternative text had questionable or repetitive alternative text—such as alt="image", "graphic", "blank", a file name, etc., or alternative text identical to adjacent text or the alternative text of an adjacent image.

sentences.en: 10.8% of images with alternative text had questionable or repetitive alternative text—such as alt="image", "graphic", "blank", a file name, etc., or alternative text identical to adjacent text or the alternative text of an adjacent image.
sentences.zh: 10.8% 的带有替代文本的图像具有可疑或重复的替代文本，例如 alt="image"、"graphic"、"blank"、文件名等，或者与相邻文本或相邻图像的替代文本相同的替代文本。

blocks.html_en: These data show that more than one in four images on popular home pages have missing, questionable, or repetitive alternative text. The proportion of problematic images, however, is steadily decreasing over time.

sentences.en: These data show that more than one in four images on popular home pages have missing, questionable, or repetitive alternative text.
sentences.zh: 这些数据显示，热门主页上超过四分之一的图像存在缺失、可疑或重复的替代文本。

sentences.en: The proportion of problematic images, however, is steadily decreasing over time.
sentences.zh: 然而，有问题的图像的比例随着时间的推移而稳步下降。

blocks.html_en: Home pages had 6.9 form inputs on average—a 36% increase in the last 3 years. One third (33.1%) of those form inputs were not properly labeled (either via <label>, aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title).

sentences.en: Home pages had 6.9 form inputs on average—a 36% increase in the last 3 years.
sentences.zh: 主页平均有 6.9 个表单输入——过去 3 年增加了 36%。

sentences.en: One third (33.1%) of those form inputs were not properly labeled (either via <label>, aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title).
sentences.zh: 三分之一 (33.1%) 的表单输入未正确标记（通过 <label>、aria-label、aria-labelledby 或 title）。

blocks.html_en: Nearly 30 million headings were detected (29.9 on average per home page). Headings were increasingly prevalent on home pages—the total number of headings increased 20.4% in just one year. The number (and prevalence) of heading levels were:

sentences.en: Nearly 30 million headings were detected (29.9 on average per home page).
sentences.zh: 检测到近 3000 万个标题（平均每个主页 29.9 个）。

sentences.en: Headings were increasingly prevalent on home pages—the total number of headings increased 20.4% in just one year.
sentences.zh: 标题在主页上越来越普遍——标题总数在短短一年内增加了 20.4%。

sentences.en: The number (and prevalence) of heading levels were:
sentences.zh: 标题级别的数量（和普遍程度）为：

blocks.html_en: The number of <h1>s per page has decreased slightly over time. The number of <h4>s and <h5>s increased slightly over time. And the number of <h2>s, <h3>s, and <h6>s increased significantly over time.

sentences.en: The number of <h1>s per page has decreased slightly over time.
sentences.zh: 随着时间的推移，每页的 <h1> 数量略有减少。

sentences.en: The number of <h4>s and <h5>s increased slightly over time.
sentences.zh: 随着时间的推移，<h4> 和 <h5> 的数量略有增加。

sentences.en: And the number of <h2>s, <h3>s, and <h6>s increased significantly over time.
sentences.zh: 随着时间的推移，<h2>、<h3> 和 <h6> 的数量显着增加。

blocks.html_en: The number of <h6>s more than doubled in the last year. Interestingly, 94.9% of home pages that have at least one <h6> also have skipped heading levels. This suggests that most of these headings probably do not reflect the actual document structure.

sentences.en: The number of <h6>s more than doubled in the last year.
sentences.zh: 去年，<h6> 的数量增加了一倍多。

sentences.en: Interestingly, 94.9% of home pages that have at least one <h6> also have skipped heading levels.
sentences.zh: 有趣的是，94.9% 至少有一个 <h6> 的主页也跳过了标题级别。

sentences.en: This suggests that most of these headings probably do not reflect the actual document structure.
sentences.zh: 这表明大多数标题可能不反映实际的文档结构。

blocks.html_en: Because headings are the primary mechanism used by screen reader users to navigate content, their proper implementation is important. 18.1% of home pages had more than one <h1>—an increase from 16.3% in 2025. There were 1,206,444 instances of skipped heading levels (e.g., jumping from <h2> to <h4>)—one in every 25 headings. Skipped heading levels were present on 41.8% of all pages, up from 39% in 2025. 7.5% of pages had no headings, down from 9.8% in 2025.

sentences.en: Because headings are the primary mechanism used by screen reader users to navigate content, their proper implementation is important.
sentences.zh: 由于标题是屏幕阅读器用户用于导航内容的主要机制，因此正确实施标题非常重要。

sentences.en: 18.1% of home pages had more than one <h1>—an increase from 16.3% in 2025.
sentences.zh: 18.1% 的主页有多个 <h1>，这一比例较 2025 年的 16.3% 有所增加。

sentences.en: There were 1,206,444 instances of skipped heading levels (e.g., jumping from <h2> to <h4>)—one in every 25 headings.
sentences.zh: 有 1,206,444 个跳过标题级别的实例（例如，从 <h2> 跳到 <h4>）——每 25 个标题就有一个。

sentences.en: Skipped heading levels were present on 41.8% of all pages, up from 39% in 2025.
sentences.zh: 跳过标题级别出现在所有页面的 41.8% 上，高于 2025 年的 39%。

sentences.en: 7.5% of pages had no headings, down from 9.8% in 2025.
sentences.zh: 7.5% 的页面没有标题，低于 2025 年的 9.8%。

blocks.html_en: Regions/landmarks were increasingly present. 84.3% of home pages had at least one region (or ARIA landmark) defined—an increase from 80.5% in 2025. A <main> element or main landmark was present on 46.1% of home pages, up from 42.6% in 2025. 18.8% of home pages had a "search" landmark, up from 16.6% in 2025.

sentences.zh: 地区/地标越来越多地出现。

sentences.en: 84.3% of home pages had at least one region (or ARIA landmark) defined—an increase from 80.5% in 2025.
sentences.zh: 84.3% 的主页至少定义了一个区域（或 ARIA 地标），这一比例较 2025 年的 80.5% 有所增加。

sentences.en: A <main> element or main landmark was present on 46.1% of home pages, up from 42.6% in 2025.
sentences.zh: <main> 元素或主要地标出现在 46.1% 的主页上，高于 2025 年的 42.6%。

sentences.en: 18.8% of home pages had a "search" landmark, up from 16.6% in 2025.
sentences.zh: 18.8% 的主页有“搜索”标志，高于 2025 年的 16.6%。

blocks.html_en: 133,589,803 ARIA attributes were detected—over 133 per page on average! ARIA code increased 27% in just one year and is over 6 times higher than it was in 2019.

sentences.en: 133,589,803 ARIA attributes were detected—over 133 per page on average!
sentences.zh: 检测到 133,589,803 个 ARIA 属性 — 平均每页超过 133 个！

sentences.en: ARIA code increased 27% in just one year and is over 6 times higher than it was in 2019.
sentences.zh: ARIA 代码在短短一年内增加了 27%，是 2019 年的 6 倍多。

blocks.html_en: This chart shows the number of ARIA attributes per home page over time:

sentences.en: This chart shows the number of ARIA attributes per home page over time:
sentences.zh: 此图表显示了一段时间内每个主页的 ARIA 属性数量：

blocks.html_en: The prevalence of ARIA labels and descriptions increased 28% in just the last year. Home pages averaged 31.4 aria-label, aria-labelledby, or aria-describedby attributes.

sentences.en: The prevalence of ARIA labels and descriptions increased 28% in just the last year.
sentences.zh: 仅去年一年，ARIA 标签和描述的流行率就增加了 28%。

sentences.en: Home pages averaged 31.4 aria-label, aria-labelledby, or aria-describedby attributes.
sentences.zh: 主页平均有 31.4 个 aria-label、aria-labelledby 或 aria-scribedby 属性。

blocks.html_en: 82.7% of the one million home pages used ARIA (excluding ARIA landmark roles), up from 79.4% in 2025. Home pages with ARIA present had significantly more errors (59.1 on average) than pages without ARIA (42 on average). While ARIA is intended to improve accessibility, one would expect to encounter an additional 17 potential barriers on home pages with ARIA present.

sentences.en: 82.7% of the one million home pages used ARIA (excluding ARIA landmark roles), up from 79.4% in 2025.
sentences.zh: 100 万个主页中有 82.7% 使用了 ARIA（不包括 ARIA 标志性角色），高于 2025 年的 79.4%。

sentences.en: Home pages with ARIA present had significantly more errors (59.1 on average) than pages without ARIA (42 on average).
sentences.zh: 存在 ARIA 的主页比不存在 ARIA 的页面（平均 42）有更多的错误（平均 59.1）。

sentences.en: While ARIA is intended to improve accessibility, one would expect to encounter an additional 17 potential barriers on home pages with ARIA present.
sentences.zh: 虽然 ARIA 旨在提高可访问性，但人们预计在存在 ARIA 的主页上会遇到额外的 17 个潜在障碍。

blocks.html_en: Increased ARIA usage on pages was associated with higher detected errors. The more ARIA attributes that were present, the more detected accessibility errors could be expected. This does not necessarily mean that ARIA introduced these errors (these pages were also more complex), but pages typically had significantly more errors when more ARIA was present.

sentences.en: Increased ARIA usage on pages was associated with higher detected errors.
sentences.zh: 页面上 ARIA 使用率的增加与检测到的错误增多相关。

sentences.en: The more ARIA attributes that were present, the more detected accessibility errors could be expected.
sentences.zh: 存在的 ARIA 属性越多，检测到的可访问性错误就越多。

sentences.en: This does not necessarily mean that ARIA introduced these errors (these pages were also more complex), but pages typically had significantly more errors when more ARIA was present.
sentences.zh: 这并不一定意味着 ARIA 引入了这些错误（这些页面也更复杂），但当存在更多 ARIA 时，页面通常会出现更多错误。

blocks.html_en: 5.7% of home pages had an ARIA menu (role="menu"), but 22% of those ARIA menus introduced accessibility barriers due to the lack of necessary ARIA menu markup and interactions.

sentences.en: 5.7% of home pages had an ARIA menu (role="menu"), but 22% of those ARIA menus introduced accessibility barriers due to the lack of necessary ARIA menu markup and interactions.
sentences.zh: 5.7% 的主页有 ARIA 菜单 (role="menu")，但其中 22% 的 ARIA 菜单由于缺乏必要的 ARIA 菜单标记和交互而引入了可访问性障碍。

blocks.html_en: Home pages averaged 23.3 aria-hidden="true" attributes (up 30% from 18 in 2025 and over 250% since 2020) and 4.8 role="button" attributes (up from 3.6 in 2025). Home pages averaged 30.4 instances of tabindex=0 or tabindex=-1 (up 17% from 26 in 2025 and up nearly 300% since 2020).

sentences.en: Home pages averaged 23.3 aria-hidden="true" attributes (up 30% from 18 in 2025 and over 250% since 2020) and 4.8 role="button" attributes (up from 3.6 in 2025).
sentences.zh: 主页平均有 23.3 个 aria-hidden="true" 属性（比 2025 年的 18 个增加了 30%，自 2020 年以来增加了 250% 以上）和 4.8 个 role="button" 属性（比 2025 年的 3.6 个增加）。

sentences.en: Home pages averaged 30.4 instances of tabindex=0 or tabindex=-1 (up 17% from 26 in 2025 and up nearly 300% since 2020).
sentences.zh: 主页平均有 30.4 个 tabindex=0 或 tabindex=-1 实例（比 2025 年的 26 个增加了 17%，自 2020 年以来增加了近 300%）。

blocks.html_en: 15.2% of pages had ambiguous link text, such as "click here", "more", "continue", etc. (an increase from 13.7% of pages in 2025, though down from 23.2% in 2020). These pages had 5.3 instances of ambiguous links on average (down from 6.8 in 2025).

sentences.en: 15.2% of pages had ambiguous link text, such as "click here", "more", "continue", etc. (an increase from 13.7% of pages in 2025, though down from 23.2% in 2020).
sentences.zh: 15.2% 的页面有不明确的链接文本，例如“点击此处”、“更多”、“继续”等（较 2025 年的 13.7% 有所增加，但较 2020 年的 23.2% 有所下降）。

sentences.en: These pages had 5.3 instances of ambiguous links on average (down from 6.8 in 2025).
sentences.zh: 这些页面平均有 5.3 个不明确链接（低于 2025 年的 6.8 个）。

blocks.html_en: 17.1% of home pages had a "skip" link present, up from 15.3% in 2025. One out of every ten "skip" links were broken—either they were hidden in a way that made them inaccessible or the link target was not present in the page.

sentences.en: 17.1% of home pages had a "skip" link present, up from 15.3% in 2025.
sentences.zh: 17.1% 的主页存在“跳过”链接，高于 2025 年的 15.3%。

sentences.en: One out of every ten "skip" links were broken—either they were hidden in a way that made them inaccessible or the link target was not present in the page.
sentences.zh: 每十个“跳过”链接中就有一个被破坏 - 它们要么以某种方式隐藏，导致无法访问，要么链接目标不存在于页面中。

blocks.html_en: 93.2% of home pages had a valid HTML5 doctype—an increase from 92.4% in 2025, 91.6% in 2024, 89.8% in 2023, 86.1% in 2022 and 79.1% in 2021. Pages with a valid HTML5 doctype had nearly double the number of page elements (average of 1497 vs. 754). They also had more detectable errors (average of 56.4 vs. 51.7) than pages with other doctypes. 468 unique doctypes were encountered in the million-page sample.

sentences.en: 93.2% of home pages had a valid HTML5 doctype—an increase from 92.4% in 2025, 91.6% in 2024, 89.8% in 2023, 86.1% in 2022 and 79.1% in 2021.
Pages with a valid HTML5 doctype had nearly double the number of page elements (average of 1497 vs. 754).
sentences.zh: 具有有效 HTML5 文档类型的页面的页面元素数量几乎翻倍（平均为 1497 对 754）。

sentences.en: They also had more detectable errors (average of 56.4 vs. 51.7) than pages with other doctypes.
sentences.zh: 与其他文档类型的页面相比，它们的可检测错误也更多（平均为 56.4 比 51.7）。

sentences.en: 468 unique doctypes were encountered in the million-page sample.
sentences.zh: 在百万页样本中遇到了 468 个独特的文档类型。

blocks.html_en: Site category data was collected using Amazon Web Services Bedrock AI.

sentences.en: Site category data was collected using Amazon Web Services Bedrock AI.
sentences.zh: 网站类别数据是使用 Amazon Web Services Bedrock AI 收集的。

blocks.html_en: The tables below show the average number of pages and detectable errors in each category, and the percent difference in errors for that category from the average of 56.1 errors for the entire million-page sample—ordered from "best" to "worst". In other words, the percentage difference is how much better or worse home pages in that category were than the average home page.

sentences.en: The tables below show the average number of pages and detectable errors in each category, and the percent difference in errors for that category from the average of 56.1 errors for the entire million-page sample—ordered from "best" to "worst".
sentences.zh: 下表显示了每个类别中的平均页数和可检测到的错误，以及该类别的错误与整个百万页样本的平均 56.1 个错误之间的百分比差异（按从“最佳”到“最差”排序）。

sentences.en: In other words, the percentage difference is how much better or worse home pages in that category were than the average home page.
sentences.zh: 换句话说，百分比差异是该类别中的主页比平均主页好多少或差多少。

blocks.html_en: There were notable differences in accessibility errors for sites in different categories.

sentences.en: There were notable differences in accessibility errors for sites in different categories.
sentences.zh: 不同类别网站的可访问性错误存在显着差异。

blocks.html_en: 1,016 unique top-level domains (e.g., com, .tv, .fashion, etc.) were represented in the million pages analyzed. The table below shows select TLDs with home page counts, average number of errors per home page, and percentage difference from the average of 56.1 errors for the entire million-page sample.

sentences.en: 1,016 unique top-level domains (e.g., com, .tv, .fashion, etc.) were represented in the million pages analyzed.
sentences.zh: 分析的百万个页面中包含 1,016 个独特的顶级域名（例如 com、.tv、.fashion 等）。

sentences.en: The table below shows select TLDs with home page counts, average number of errors per home page, and percentage difference from the average of 56.1 errors for the entire million-page sample.
sentences.zh: 下表显示了选定 TLD 的主页计数、每个主页的平均错误数以及与整个百万页样本的平均 56.1 个错误的百分比差异。

sentences.en: This shows notable differences between TLDs.
sentences.zh: 这显示了 TLD 之间的显着差异。

blocks.html_en: 87.3% of pages had a document language defined. This table shows the number of pages, average number of errors, and percentage difference in errors from the overall average of 56.1 for the most common page languages (n>5000).

sentences.en: 87.3% of pages had a document language defined.
sentences.zh: 87.3% 的页面定义了文档语言。

sentences.en: This table shows the number of pages, average number of errors, and percentage difference in errors from the overall average of 56.1 for the most common page languages (n>5000).
sentences.zh: 此表显示了最常见页面语言 (n>5000) 的页面数、平均错误数以及与总体平均值 56.1 的错误百分比差异。

blocks.html_en: As with TLDs, there were significant differences in accessibility of pages across languages.

sentences.en: As with TLDs, there were significant differences in accessibility of pages across languages.
sentences.zh: 与 TLD 一样，不同语言页面的可访问性存在显着差异。

blocks.html_en: Over 1,200 different types of web technologies were detected on the one million home pages. Common technologies detected are listed below. Note that correspondence of additional errors with a technology cannot always be attributed to that technology.

sentences.en: Over 1,200 different types of web technologies were detected on the one million home pages.
sentences.zh: 在 100 万个主页上检测到了 1,200 多种不同类型的网络技术。

sentences.en: Common technologies detected are listed below.
sentences.zh: 下面列出了检测到的常见技术。

sentences.en: Note that correspondence of additional errors with a technology cannot always be attributed to that technology.
sentences.zh: 请注意，附加错误与技术的对应并不总是归因于该技术。

sentences.en: Content management systems and site builders
sentences.zh: 内容管理系统和网站建设者

blocks.html_en: There was a wide diversity in the impact that the CMS choice appeared to have on accessibility with home pages. Most pages that use a common CMS had fewer errors than average.

sentences.en: There was a wide diversity in the impact that the CMS choice appeared to have on accessibility with home pages.
sentences.zh: CMS 选择对主页可访问性的影响似乎多种多样。

sentences.en: Most pages that use a common CMS had fewer errors than average.
sentences.zh: 大多数使用通用 CMS 的页面的错误少于平均水平。

blocks.html_en: The presence of nearly all of these popular JavaScript libraries was associated with an increase in detected accessibility errors.

sentences.en: The presence of nearly all of these popular JavaScript libraries was associated with an increase in detected accessibility errors.
sentences.zh: 几乎所有这些流行的 JavaScript 库的存在都与检测到的可访问性错误的增加有关。

blocks.html_en: Pages that utilized most of these popular ad systems had more errors on average than pages that did not utilize ad networks. The data suggest that ads were among the strongest harbingers of accessibility errors.

sentences.en: Pages that utilized most of these popular ad systems had more errors on average than pages that did not utilize ad networks.
sentences.zh: 使用大多数流行广告系统的页面平均比不使用广告网络的页面有更多错误。

sentences.en: The data suggest that ads were among the strongest harbingers of accessibility errors.
sentences.zh: 数据表明，广告是可访问性错误的最强烈先兆之一。

blocks.html_en: Other common technologies also correlated to more errors:

sentences.en: Other common technologies also correlated to more errors:
sentences.zh: 其他常见技术也与更多错误相关：

blocks.html_en: • 9.6% of pages had ReCAPTCHA, and these pages had 7.7 more errors than average.

sentences.en: 9.6% of pages had ReCAPTCHA, and these pages had 7.7 more errors than average.
sentences.zh: 9.6% 的页面有 ReCAPTCHA，这些页面的错误比平均水平多 7.7 个。

blocks.html_en: • 6.2% of pages were detected as having YouTube videos and these pages had 9.4 more errors than average.

sentences.en: 6.2% of pages were detected as having YouTube videos and these pages had 9.4 more errors than average.
sentences.zh: 6.2% 的页面被检测为包含 YouTube 视频，这些页面的错误比平均水平高 9.4 个。

blocks.html_en: Web sites that used common cookie compliance technologies, such as OneTrust (34.6 errors on average), averaged notably fewer errors than average, whereas sites that used browser fingerprinting and user tracking technologies, such as FingerprintJS (112.4 errors on average), had significantly more errors than average. This may suggest a relationship between user privacy and accessibility practices.

sentences.en: Web sites that used common cookie compliance technologies, such as OneTrust (34.6 errors on average), averaged notably fewer errors than average, whereas sites that used browser fingerprinting and user tracking technologies, such as FingerprintJS (112.4 errors on average), had significantly more errors than average.

sentences.en: This may suggest a relationship between user privacy and accessibility practices.

content_html_zh:
介绍

WebAIM 连续第八年对前 1,000,000 个网站的主页进行了可访问性评估。 评估是使用 WAVE 独立 API（带有用于收集网站技术和类别数据的附加工具）进行的。 研究结果概述并深入了解了残障人士网络无障碍的现状以及随时间变化的趋势。

Note!

以下结果来自 2026 年 2 月，与 2019 年、2020 年、2021 年、2022 年、2023 年、2024 年和 2025 年的早期分析进行了比较和趋势。

WebAIM 可以通过提供培训、测试、咨询和技术援助来帮助您完成无障碍之旅。

样本

站点查询

您的主页在我们的研究中排名如何？ 在下面输入网站域名以查看详细信息。

百万主页列表源自 Tranco 排名，该排名结合了多个“顶级”网站的来源。

没有主页的网站、返回错误（404 等）的页面、少于 10 个 HTML 元素的页面以及具有超过 5,000 个指向同一域的链接（用于 SEO 目的）的页面不包括在内。

方法论

WAVE 可访问性引擎用于分析应用脚本和样式后所有页面的渲染 DOM（文档对象模型）。 WAVE 可检测最终用户可访问性障碍和 Web 内容可访问性指南 (WCAG) 2.2 A/AA 一致性故障。 所有自动化工具（包括 WAVE）都有局限性——并非所有一致性故障都能自动检测到。 未检测到错误并不表示页面可访问或符合要求。 尽管此报告仅描述了仅 1,000,000 个主页的可访问性问题的子集，但此报告提供了网络上最有影响力的页面的可访问性当前状态的量化和可靠的表示。

检测到的错误

在 100 万个主页中，检测到 56,114,377 个不同的可访问性错误，平均每页有 56.1 个错误。 自 2025 年分析发现每页 51 个错误以来，检测到的错误数量增加了 10.1%。 “错误”是 WAVE 检测到的可访问性障碍，对最终用户有显着影响，并且很有可能成为 WCAG 2.2 A/AA 级一致性故障。

此图表显示了一段时间内每个主页可检测到的错误的平均数量：

主页复杂性

测试的主页有超过 14 亿个页面元素。 主页的复杂性持续稳步增加。 2026 年 2 月，每个主页的平均页面元素数量增加至 1437 个，仅一年时间就增加了 22.5%！

下图显示了随时间变化检测到的主页元素的数量：

过去 7 年中，主页元素的数量几乎增加了一倍。 3.9% 的主页元素检测到可访问性错误。 残障用户预计每 26 个主页元素中就有 1 个会遇到错误。

Note!

错误密度（错误数量除以页面元素数量）在站点查找中提供，但它本身是站点可访问性的不可靠指标。 大量的页面元素（例如 <div> 和 <span> 元素）可能会导致较低的错误密度（表明更好的可访问性），而实际上也可能引入了许多新的可访问性错误。 该报告主要关注检测到的错误（可能是最终用户障碍）的平均数量，而不是错误密度（这些错误在页面元素内的稀释程度）。

页面流行度和主页复杂性之间存在相关性。 最受欢迎的 100,000 个页面平均有 1,584 个元素，比百万页面样本中最不受欢迎的 100,000 个网站（1,318 个元素）多 20%。

WCAG 一致性

95.9% 的主页检测到 WCAG 2 故障。 这一数字从 2025 年的 94.8% 开始增加，扭转了过去 6 年每年小幅改善的趋势。 由于仅考虑了可自动检测的 WCAG 故障，因此这表明 WCAG 2 A/AA 完全符合率肯定低于 4.1%。

此图表显示随时间变化检测到 WCAG 一致性失败的主页的百分比：

虽然没有检测到错误的页面数量非常少，但 20.5% 的页面检测到 5 个或更少的错误，30.4% 的页面检测到 10 个或更少错误。

Percentage of pages with most common errors
WCAG 故障类型占主页的百分比
低对比度文本83.9%
缺少图像的替代文本53.1%
缺少表单输入标签51%
空链接46.3%
空按钮30.6%
缺少文档语言13.5%

检测到的所有错误中 96% 属于这六类。 这些最常见的错误在过去 7 年里都是一样的。 解决这几类问题将显着提高整个网络的可访问性。

缺少标签 52.8% 53.8% 54.4% 46.1% 45.9% 48.6% 48.2% 51%
空链接 58.1% 59.9% 51.3% 49.7% 50.1% 44.6% 45.4% 46.3%

自 2025 年以来，缺失替代文本和缺失文档语言的页面数量有所减少，而低对比度文本、缺失标签、空链接和空按钮的页面数量有所增加。

低对比度文本

83.9% 的主页上发现了低于 WCAG 2 AA 阈值的低对比度文本，这一比例较 2025 年的 79.1% 有所增加。 这是最常检测到的可访问性问题。 平均而言，每个主页有 34 个不同的低对比度文本实例，比 2025 年增加了 15%。

图像和替代文本

主页变得越来越图形化，主页图像的数量在 8 年内几乎翻了一番。 样本中有超过 6660 万张图像，平均每个主页有 66.6 张图像，仅一年内就增加了 13.6%，令人惊讶。 16.2% 的主页图像（平均每页 10.8 张）缺少替代文本（不包括 alt=""）。 虽然图像明显增多，但缺少替代文本的图像比例从 2025 年的 18.5% 下降。 缺少替代文本的图像中有 45% 是链接图像，导致链接不具有描述性。 每四个链接图像中就有一个缺少替代文本。

10.8% 的带有替代文本的图像具有可疑或重复的替代文本，例如 alt="image"、"graphic"、"blank"、文件名等，或者与相邻文本或相邻图像的替代文本相同的替代文本。

这些数据显示，热门主页上超过四分之一的图像存在缺失、可疑或重复的替代文本。 然而，有问题的图像的比例随着时间的推移而稳步下降。

表格标签

主页平均有 6.9 个表单输入——过去 3 年增加了 36%。 三分之一 (33.1%) 的表单输入未正确标记（通过 <label>、aria-label、aria-labelledby 或 title）。

标题

检测到近 3000 万个标题（平均每个主页 29.9 个）。 标题在主页上越来越普遍——标题总数在短短一年内增加了 20.4%。 标题级别的数量（和普遍程度）为：

  • 150 万个 <h1> 标题 (5.1%)
  • 870 万个 <h2> 标题 (29%)
  • 1120 万个 <h3> 标题 (37.5%)
  • 440 万个 <h4> 标题 (14.7%)
  • 200 万个 <h5> 标题 (6.8%)
  • 210 万个 <h6> 标题 (6.9%)

随着时间的推移，每页的 <h1> 数量略有减少。 随着时间的推移，<h4> 和 <h5> 的数量略有增加。 随着时间的推移，<h2>、<h3> 和 <h6> 的数量显着增加。

去年，<h6> 的数量增加了一倍多。 有趣的是，94.9% 至少有一个 <h6> 的主页也跳过了标题级别。 这表明大多数标题可能不反映实际的文档结构。

由于标题是屏幕阅读器用户用于导航内容的主要机制，因此正确实施标题非常重要。 18.1% 的主页有多个 <h1>，这一比例较 2025 年的 16.3% 有所增加。 有 1,206,444 个跳过标题级别的实例（例如，从 <h2> 跳到 <h4>）——每 25 个标题就有一个。 跳过标题级别出现在所有页面的 41.8% 上，高于 2025 年的 39%。 7.5% 的页面没有标题，低于 2025 年的 9.8%。

地区

地区/地标越来越多地出现。 84.3% 的主页至少定义了一个区域（或 ARIA 地标），这一比例较 2025 年的 80.5% 有所增加。 <main> 元素或主要地标出现在 46.1% 的主页上，高于 2025 年的 42.6%。 18.8% 的主页有“搜索”标志，高于 2025 年的 16.6%。

ARIA

检测到 133,589,803 个 ARIA 属性 — 平均每页超过 133 个！ ARIA 代码在短短一年内增加了 27%，是 2019 年的 6 倍多。

此图表显示了一段时间内每个主页的 ARIA 属性数量：

仅去年一年，ARIA 标签和描述的流行率就增加了 28%。 主页平均有 31.4 个 aria-label、aria-labelledby 或 aria-scribedby 属性。

100 万个主页中有 82.7% 使用了 ARIA（不包括 ARIA 标志性角色），高于 2025 年的 79.4%。 存在 ARIA 的主页比不存在 ARIA 的页面（平均 42）有更多的错误（平均 59.1）。 虽然 ARIA 旨在提高可访问性，但人们预计在存在 ARIA 的主页上会遇到额外的 17 个潜在障碍。

页面上 ARIA 使用率的增加与检测到的错误增多相关。 存在的 ARIA 属性越多，检测到的可访问性错误就越多。 这并不一定意味着 ARIA 引入了这些错误（这些页面也更复杂），但当存在更多 ARIA 时，页面通常会出现更多错误。

5.7% 的主页有 ARIA 菜单 (role="menu")，但其中 22% 的 ARIA 菜单由于缺乏必要的 ARIA 菜单标记和交互而引入了可访问性障碍。

主页平均有 23.3 个 aria-hidden="true" 属性（比 2025 年的 18 个增加了 30%，自 2020 年以来增加了 250% 以上）和 4.8 个 role="button" 属性（比 2025 年的 3.6 个增加）。 主页平均有 30.4 个 tabindex=0 或 tabindex=-1 实例（比 2025 年的 26 个增加了 17%，自 2020 年以来增加了近 300%）。

Links

15.2% 的页面有不明确的链接文本，例如“点击此处”、“更多”、“继续”等（较 2025 年的 13.7% 有所增加，但较 2020 年的 23.2% 有所下降）。 这些页面平均有 5.3 个不明确链接（低于 2025 年的 6.8 个）。

跳过链接

17.1% 的主页存在“跳过”链接，高于 2025 年的 15.3%。 每十个“跳过”链接中就有一个被破坏 - 它们要么以某种方式隐藏，导致无法访问，要么链接目标不存在于页面中。

文档类型

93.2% 的主页具有有效的 HTML5 文档类型，这一比例较 2025 年的 92.4%、2024 年的 91.6%、2023 年的 89.8%、2022 年的 86.1% 和 2021 年的 79.1% 有所增加。 具有有效 HTML5 文档类型的页面的页面元素数量几乎翻倍（平均为 1497 对 754）。 与其他文档类型的页面相比，它们的可检测错误也更多（平均为 56.4 比 51.7）。 在百万页样本中遇到了 468 个独特的文档类型。

网站类别

Note!

网站类别数据是使用 Amazon Web Services Bedrock AI 收集的。

其他技术

其他常见技术也与更多错误相关：

  • 9.6% 的页面有 ReCAPTCHA，这些页面的错误比平均水平多 7.7 个。
  • 6.2% 的页面被检测为包含 YouTube 视频，这些页面的错误比平均水平高 9.4 个。

使用常见 Cookie 合规性技术（例如 OneTrust（平均 34.6 个错误））的网站，平均错误明显少于平均水平，而使用浏览器指纹识别和用户跟踪技术（例如 FingerprintJS）（平均 112.4 个错误）的网站，错误明显多于平均水平。 这可能表明用户隐私和可访问性实践之间存在关系。

在 143,575 页上观察到 948,225 个表格（低于 2025 年在 142,976 页上的 972,746 个表格）。 181,188 (19%) 个表具有有效的数据表标记。

结论

2026 年 WebAIM Million 分析发现，检测到的可访问性错误数量和 WCAG 合规性失败页面数量均显着增加，扭转了近年来可访问性逐步改善的趋势。 主要关注的是主页复杂性和 ARIA 代码的显着增加，这两者都与可检测错误的增加相关。

这些趋势可能反映了网络开发中更广泛的转变，包括对第三方框架和库以及自动化或人工智能辅助编码实践（“vibe 编码”）的依赖增加。 主页正以惊人的速度变得越来越大，技术也越来越复杂，使得可访问性变得更加难以实现和维护。 今年报告的一个关键要点是，大规模提高可访问性将需要更好的实践和更简单的系统。 另外，复杂的系统需要更好地关注可访问性基础知识。
